features: OdourClear Technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent
Spray it all around the house to fight odours and freshen
Available in a wide range of fragrances
description: Product Description Febreze Air Freshener Spray with OdourClear Technology fights tough lingering odours and leaves a fresh scent. Discover the Fresh Linen fragrance, inspired by the sensation of freshly washed linen with a touch of fresh spring flowers. Spray it all around the house to fight odours and freshen. Febreze Air Freshener is non-flammable and is available in a wide range of fragrances. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP
